title: The Lost Temple of Aztlanm no items

start.text: You stand at the entrance of the fabled Lost Temple of Aztlan, rumored to hold untold treasures and ancient secrets long forgotten by time.
start.image_prompt: An ancient, overgrown temple entrance in the dense jungle, mist swirling around carved stone pillars, intricate Aztec patterns, high detail, photorealistic, 8k resolution, atmospheric lighting, by James Gurney and Jean-Baptiste Monge
start.environment: Dense jungle surrounds you, the air thick with humidity and the sounds of distant wildlife.

temple_entrance.text: As you step inside, the darkness engulfs you, but soon your eyes adjust to the dim glow of ancient torches that flicker to life on their own.
temple_entrance.image_prompt: An ancient temple corridor lit by eerie, self-igniting torches, walls adorned with mysterious hieroglyphs, high detail, 8k, dramatic shadows, by Dan Mumford
temple_entrance.event: The entrance behind you seals shut with a thunderous boom.

hall_of_whispers.text: You find yourself in the Hall of Whispers, where faint voices echo around you, speaking in an ancient tongue.
hall_of_whispers.environment: The walls seem to be alive, their carvings shifting subtly as if whispering secrets.
hall_of_whispers.image_prompt: A grand hall with walls covered in shifting glyphs, ghostly whispers wafting through the air, high detail, ethereal glow, 8k resolution, by Yoann Lossel

npc.name: Mysterious Shade
npc.dialogue: Only those who understand the past may proceed.

decipher_glyphs.text: You study the shifting glyphs, and they reveal a story of a lost civilization and a powerful artifact hidden within.
decipher_glyphs.event: Gained knowledge about the Temple's secret.

trap_room.text: You enter a room with a mosaic floor depicting a sun. As you step forward, arrows shoot from the walls!
trap_room.image_prompt: An ancient chamber with sun mosaic on the floor, walls suddenly firing arrows, high detail, dynamic action, 8k, by Peter Mohrbacher

underground_lake.text: After narrowly escaping the trap, you find yourself at the edge of an underground lake, its waters eerily still.
underground_lake.image_prompt: An expansive underground lake with a mirror-like surface, illuminated by bioluminescent plants, high detail, 8k, serene atmosphere, by Ivan Aivazovsky
underground_lake.event: A boat rests at the water's edge, seemingly waiting for you.

lake_crossing.text: As you paddle across the lake, a colossal serpent emerges from the depths!
lake_crossing.image_prompt: A colossal serpent rising from the dark waters of an underground lake, mouth open wide, high detail, dramatic lighting, 8k, by H.R. Giger

battle.message: Defeat the Serpent Guardian to proceed!

sanctum_door.text: You arrive at a massive door adorned with ancient symbols, pulsing with mystical energy.
sanctum_door.image_prompt: A colossal door with glowing ancient symbols, mystical energy swirling around, high detail, 8k, by Alex Grey

npc.name: Guardian Spirit
npc.dialogue: Prove your worth by solving the riddle, or face eternal damnation.

use_knowledge.text: Using the knowledge gained earlier, you recite the incantations inscribed in the glyphs. The door slowly opens.
use_knowledge.event: Your wisdom has granted you passage.

inner_sanctum.text: You step into the Inner Sanctum, where the legendary Sunstone rests upon an ornate pedestal.
inner_sanctum.image_prompt: A grand chamber with a glowing Sunstone atop an ornate pedestal, rays of light illuminating the room, high detail, 8k, by John Harris
inner_sanctum.event: As you approach, the final guardian emerges.

battle.message: The Ancient Golem awakens! Defeat it to claim the Sunstone!

conclusion.text: With the Golem defeated, you claim the Sunstone, feeling its immense power coursing through you.
conclusion.image_prompt: A triumphant figure holding the radiant Sunstone, light emanating in all directions, high detail, 8k, by Greg Rutkowski
conclusion.event: You have become the master of the Lost Temple of Aztlan.
